form.formComment: Improved last start with a solid effort when 3rd over 2100m at Vincennes, beaten 12m by Klarck De Vandel in 6-9yo amateur drivers on April 7 at $47. Capable of another top-three finish.

form.formComment: Didn't do much at the last run, 6th over 2550m at this track, beaten 26m by Juste Du Gers in 7-10yo race on March 14 at $50. Before that 6th over 2700m at Le Croisé-Laroche beaten 13m by Kalmio De Lou in 6-8yo race on March 2 at $10. Would be better placed in something easier.

form.formComment: Recent form below what she is capable of. Last start 9th (25m) over 2825m at Cordemais beaten 82m by Jade Renardier in 7-11yo handicap on March 8 at $77. The start before unplaced over 2700m at Vincennes well beaten by Hyper Haufor in 8-10yo race on February 25 at $8.20. Good enough to turn things around.
